medical_history.chief_complaint: both hand tremor and gait disturbance
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: symptoms started 3 months ago; patient has diabetes mellitus and end-stage renal disease for 15 years; undergoing hemodialysis three times a week for 2 years; parkinsonism gradually improved with intensive hemodialysis; after 3 months, patient revisited for paroxysmal dystonic head tremor, dysphagia, hypophonia and gait disturbance; symptoms and lesions disappeared after intensive hemodialysis and blood sugar control

physical_examination.specialty_examination: hypomimia, shuffling gait, bradykinesia and resting tremor in both hands
